title: Accepted: Fixed Points and Stochastic Meritocracies
body: Our paper **[Fixed Points and Stochastic Meritocracies: A Long-Term Perspective](/projects/stochastic-merit/)** was accepted to **[FAccT 2026](https://facctconference.org/2026/index.html)**.

title: Preprint: Budgeting Discretion
body: New preprint on modeling discretion as a budgeted resource available **[online](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.10039)** .
